title: OEKA201Assignment
text:
About this website
The site contains our econmetrics assignmetn analysing mortality rates across US states using socioeconomic & health-related variables.
The assinment is presented in two versions: - Bjørnar’s assignment using Gretl - estimation and analysis performed in Gretl - Bjørnar’s assignment using R - the same analysis replicatied using R code
